description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe, predominantly dark gray with three silver stripes on the side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The upper is made of synthetic mesh and textile materials, with visible wear and creasing, especially around the toe box and heel collar. The midsole is white and textured, likely made from EVA foam or Boost material, showing signs of dirt and use. There are blue accent details on the outsole and tongue, adding a pop of color to the otherwise muted palette. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat laces, and the heel features a reinforced counter for stability. The shoe appears to be well-constructed but shows clear signs of regular use, with some fraying and discoloration.
description: A dark gray athletic running shoe with silver stripes, blue accents, and a white textured midsole, showing visible signs of wear and use.
description_view_0: Side view showing three silver stripes, blue heel accent, and the full length of the white midsole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the blue heel tab, heel counter, and the back of the white midsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar silver stripes, visible branding, and a worn outsole edge.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the toe box, lacing system, and blue logo on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Three silver stripes on the side, blue Adidas logo on the tongue and heel tab.
